summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgendaHub platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but critical frontend issue preventing dashboard from loading due to SelectItem component error.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: Status code inconsistency, but functionality works correctly

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_issues.impact: Status code inconsistency, but functionality works correctly

critical_bugs.issue: SelectItem components with empty string values causing React error: 'A <SelectItem /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents entire dashboard from loading - complete UI failure
critical_bugs.error_details: SelectItem with value='' for 'Todos' options in filter dropdowns

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard completely fails to render due to SelectItem error
Supervisor dashboard also fails to load due to same SelectItem error

integration_issues.issue: Login works correctly but redirects to broken dashboard

passed_tests: User management APIs (get users, get specific user, team stats)
Appointment CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Role-based access control (supervisor vs operator permissions)
Authentication flow and JWT token handling
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix SelectItem components in Sidebar.js - replace empty string values with null or undefined for 'Todos' options in filter dropdowns (lines 52, 67, 84). This is preventing the entire dashboard from loading.
